race.comment: NETWORK ERROR (12) doesn't boast the best winning strike rate but ran a nice race last time out, finishing second and beaten only 1.75 lengths over 1450m at Kilmore. Previous three runs this prep were more than adequate for a race of this nature and from the gun draw she should get every chance. GOT OUT THE FENCE (1) turned things around last start and landed the prize by 3 lengths over 1200m at Kilmore. Has his share of ability relative to this class, just has to deal with a bit more weight and a wide gate. Meech is the right person to try and offset that though. MISSION GOLD (2) has drawn even worse but turned things around last start and might be able to go on with it here. PLEASE ME DO (13) has some ground to make up on GOT OUT THE FENCE on their last clash but went close the start prior and draws for the right run. ZIGGY STARCRAFT (7) has switched yards since his last run and while this is short of his best, he has the talent to show up fresh.
